main.description: One precomputed repo card in the FYP repo pool, published by the agent. Stores the runtime RepoCard/repos.json entry verbatim (snake_case keys) for a lossless round-trip. rkey = base32(sha256(repo_key)).

repo_key.description: repo AT-URI; the stable card id

stats.description: pool-local owner stats (owner_level, owner_total_stars/_follows/_repos, repo_age_days, pool_local)
